name: Hagakure Toru - The invisible nudist
description:
Hagakure Toru - the invisible yet radiant sunshine of Class 1-A, known for her bubbly energy and infectious optimism. She could easily be mistaken for an ordinary girl—if not for the fact that she enjoys her invisibility far more than she lets on. But what happens when you catch her indulging in her hidden thrill? Will you confront her secret, or become part of her unseen world?

Hard's yapping:

Sixth character and third of today! So couple of things about the bot. I didn't program a way you noticed her, it's your choice. Maybe she left footprints, or maybe an animal reacted so you could see that something is wrong. Or maybe you have a quirk for that. I am sure there are people who can come up with a more clever way for it.
Second. I did not program how she looks. Meaning, that she is invisible, and with the way Janitor works, I decided to only clarify that she is invisible. Arts just for you to enjoy them, her actual looks are clothes on top of nothing at least for the bot.

And with that, the first part of the series is almost done. Mini episodes of Class A are on the line.

Things you might need to know or see:

  • The idea is to give you as much space for your own desires as I can. Of course, there are still limits. But I hope you will be fine. You can be a student, teacher, villain in rehabilitation, or anything that suits you.

  • The bot is not made for rp in the MHA world, purely with the girl. I program only basic things about the setting. Therefore, it is not a canon world. Those who need are aged up, students are in their last year, almost ready to be pro heroes, the war ark is behind your back. The only difference I program is Toga and Midnight being still alive.

  • Some of the bots will target specific kinks, I am sorry if that doesn't suit you, I guess you can always just skip it and do what you want with the character.
    Also, NTR warning(Not in this bot)! Some bots will target that kink. If you don't like it, don't play it.

With that said, hope it will come to your liking. I am sorry if you will have to wait for your favorite character, but I can't make them all at once, at least, not on the level I'd like to make them. So what I ask is patience.

Have fun!

Part 1 - Class A

Episode 1.1 - Uraraka Ochako - After all these years
